overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character exploring a dense forest at night during rainfall. The character, holding a lantern, discovers and examines an abandoned log cabin with a stone well before continuing along the woodland path.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path with large boulders

events.description: character stops to examine and pick a mushroom from the forest floor
character examines a plant growing near the trail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest holding a lantern, illuminating ferns and rocks along the path

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming dense canopy overhead
green ferns lining the forest floor
large grey boulders scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dense forest path at night, rain falling steadily. The lantern illuminates large rock formations and lush ferns as the character stops briefly to examine collectible mushrooms and plants along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned homestead clearing with stone well

events.description: emerges from dense forest into open clearing with abandoned stone well and wooden structures
character picks an herb growing near the stone well

agents.ego_description: approaching the abandoned homestead, examining the stone well and scattered wooden debris in the clearing

entered.detail: circular stone well with weathered walls in the clearing center
collapsed wooden fence posts and rails
derelict log cabin with missing roof and broken walls
broken planks and wooden crates scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense trees into a clearing containing an abandoned homestead. A stone well stands in the center while a dilapidated log cabin sits to the right. The character examines the area and collects herbs near the well as rain continues to fall.

events.description: discovers dead animal carcass near the cabin entrance
character picks an herb growing beside the cabin wall

agents.ego_description: circling the dilapidated log cabin, examining the broken structure, dead animal, and scattered debris

entered.detail: deceased animal lying near the cabin entrance
broken wooden wagon wheels leaning against debris

segments.scene_description: The character explores the immediate vicinity of the broken log cabin, discovering a dead animal carcass near the entrance. The lantern light reveals the extent of the decay as the character circles the structure, examining weathered logs and broken wagon wheels before collecting nearby herbs.

events.description: leaves the cabin clearing and re-enters the dense forest

agents.ego_description: walking away from the abandoned cabin along the forest path, lantern illuminating the trail ahead through the trees

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence posts marking the path boundary

segments.scene_description: The character departs the abandoned homestead, leaving the broken cabin behind and returning to the enclosed forest trail. The lantern cuts through the darkness and rain as the character continues along the path bordered by wooden fence rails and dense vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nocturnal forest that opens into a desolate homestead before returning to the enclosed woodland trail. It begins by following the character along a narrow path, where the lantern light illuminates lush ferns and rock formations as they pause to examine wild mushrooms. As the dense trees give way, the scene expands into a clearing featuring a stone well and a dilapidated log cabin, where the character gathers herbs amidst the steady rainfall. The camera then circles the decaying structure to reveal a dead animal carcass and broken wagon wheels before turning away from the ruins. Finally, the view shifts back into the oppressive darkness of the forest, following the character past wooden fence rails and thick vegetation as they disappear back into the trees.
